title: General Power of Attorney
description: A document authorizing an agent to act on behalf of a principal in financial, legal, or business matters.
disclaimer: This is a generic template provided for informational purposes only and is not a substitute for advice from a licensed attorney. Power of attorney requirements (including notarization/witnesses) vary significantly by jurisdiction.

fields.label: Powers Granted
fields.placeholder: manage bank accounts, pay bills, and sign checks on my behalf

fields.label: Effective Until (date or event)
fields.placeholder: revoked in writing by the Principal

body:
GENERAL POWER OF ATTORNEY

KNOW ALL PERSONS BY THESE PRESENTS, that I, {{principal_name}}, residing at {{principal_address}} ("Principal"), do hereby appoint {{agent_name}}, residing at {{agent_address}} ("Agent"), as my true and lawful attorney-in-fact.

1. GRANT OF AUTHORITY. I grant my Agent full power and authority to {{powers_granted}}, as fully as I could do if personally present.

2. DURATION. This Power of Attorney shall remain in effect until {{effective_until}}.

3. GOVERNING LAW. This document shall be governed by the laws of {{governing_state}}.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have signed this Power of Attorney on {{execution_date}}.

_______________________________
{{principal_name}} (Principal)

Witnessed/Notarized by:

_______________________________
